name: Cabaletta Bio, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview We are a late clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on the discovery and development of innovative engineered T cell therapies that have the potential to provide deep and durable, perhaps curative, responses with one-time administration for patients with autoimmune diseases. Our proprietary CABA , or Cabaletta Approach to B cell Ablation platform, focuses on the CARTA approach.
